subsection.title: Matrix notation
Addition
subsection.p: Matrices can be added only when they have the same size.

subsection.title: Matrix-vector multiplication
Matrix multiplication
Identity matrix
Zero matrix
Transpose
subsection.p: The transpose of A is A^T. Rows become columns.

subsection.title: Symmetric matrix
subsection.p: Symmetric matrices are especially important for Hessians and quadratic forms.

warning.p: The product AB may exist even when BA does not.
If both AB and BA exist, they may have different sizes.
